step_rationale: Neurosteroid decreased post-MI; reflects neuroendocrine and hypothalamic–pituitary axis response.
mechanism: Neuroactive steroid depletion post-myocardial infarction marks stress-response hormonal remodeling.

references.title: Impact of myocardial revascularization surgery on the plasma metabolome.
references.journal: Metabolomics : Official journal of the Metabolomic Society
